Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/f068da38ff0e8ee50fc69d7be30b800461da5aad2f49ecef8d8e95dd615b1b72/9d666387-a034-46c1-ba69-b88b58fa53b3/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
